JTAG chain bypass control (1=bypassed/excluded from chain)

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x3bc
Size:
0x4
Source:
syscon_rf.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:6] - - - -
[5] scpu_jtag_bypass rw 0x0 not used
[4] vq7_jtag_bypass rw 0x0 VQ7 DSP
[3] - - - -
[2] npue21_jtag_bypass rw 0x1 NPU E21, default bypassed
[1] u84_jtag_bypass rw 0x0 -
[0] lpcpu_jtag_bypass rw 0x1 LPCPU E21, default bypassed
